prompt:
Goal: Create a vibrant anime fantasy game key visual for an NFT game called CELESTOLIA, showing three magical girl characters in a bright outdoor fantasy setting, like a promotional splash screen or gacha-game banner.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape image, colorful high-resolution anime illustration with a cinematic mobile-game composition. Use a sunny blue sky, fluffy clouds, distant lake or sea, green hills, and pink cherry blossom trees framing the scene. Add soft bloom, sparkling highlights, and polished fantasy-game lighting.

Layout: Place the large game logo in the upper left. The logo reads “CELESTOLIA” in glowing turquoise-to-white serif letters with a thin outline, and small Japanese furigana-style text above it reading “セレストリア”. Center the composition on exactly 3 characters standing shoulder-to-shoulder across the foreground. Add a large glowing Japanese tagline across the lower middle: 誰でも簡単に始められるNFTゲーム. Add exactly 3 character name labels at the bottom, one under each character: left “チョ”, center “モンステラ”, right “ロズエル”.

Subject details: The 3 characters are: 1) left character, a cheerful blonde witch girl wearing a huge black-and-red pointed witch hat, short wavy blonde hair, white puff-sleeve blouse, dark brown vest with gold buttons, red skirt, and holding a broom or staff vertically; 2) center character, a lavender-haired crystal mage with very long pastel purple hair, blue-and-white fantasy dress, gold trim, corset lacing, floating icy crystal ornament above her head, and one hand lifted near her hair; 3) right character, a black-haired vampire or gothic magician girl with red eyes, playful open-mouth smile, oversized white-and-red witch hat with a red jewel and gold ornament, black-and-red frilled dress, white ruffled collar and cuffs, red ribbons, and an outstretched hand.

Visual style: Modern Japanese anime RPG art, glossy cel shading, saturated colors, soft atmospheric depth, clean linework, detailed costumes, magical fantasy mood, promotional game UI aesthetic. The tagline should be large, rounded, white Japanese text with pink glow and cyan shadow, centered over the characters without fully hiding them.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 foreground characters and exactly 3 bottom name labels. No extra characters, no watermark, no photorealism, no English subtitle except the main logo and “NFT” inside the Japanese tagline. Keep the logo and visible Japanese text crisp and readable.
